title: xDeck Entity DSL (§9.24)
description: Schema for entity JSON files. Applies to packaged entities at tenants/_packages/<pkg>/entities/<name>.entity.json AND tenant entities at tenants/<slug>/entities/definitions/<name>.json. Validated by EntityMigratorService + TenantEntityRegistryService at install / load time. Slices A1–B7.

name.description: Logical entity name (camelCase or kebab-case). Optional in the schema — the migrator auto-fills from the filename for packaged entities, and tenant entities are checked downstream by TenantEntityRegistryService.coerceShape. IDE tooling should still surface this field for tenants.

tableName.description: Physical table name (pre-namespace). Migrator prefixes packaged entities with <namespace_underscored>__.

table.description: Legacy alias for `tableName` — the migrator accepts either, with `tableName` taking precedence if both are set.

columns.description: Map of column name → column definition. Slice A1 supports the column types the 5 sample fixtures use; unsupported types throw at install time.

relations.description: Slice B4 — per-field relation DSL. Only meaningful at runtime; the migrator splices these into EntitySchema.options.relations.

type.description: Column SQL type. Accepts the slice-A1 union plus the `varchar(N)` shorthand. Unsupported types fail at install with PACKAGE_ENTITY_MIGRATION_FAILED.

default.description: Column default. Strings ending in `()` (e.g. `now()`) emit as raw SQL; quoted strings (`'sent'`) unwrap to literals. Numbers / booleans pass through.

inheritance.description: Tenant-side inheritance from a packaged entity. JTI (slice A3) gives the child its own table + FK; STI (slice B5) shares the parent's table; FLAT (§9.40) flattens parent columns into a concrete child table at migration time (no FK, no shared table — child is a runtime-independent copy).

discriminator.description: Required when strategy is 'STI'. The value this child carries in the parent's discriminator column.

inherits.description: §9.40 — opt-in flags governing what the child receives from the parent under FLAT inheritance. Ignored for JTI / STI strategies (they have their own inheritance shape).

sharingRules.description: When true, parent's sharing rules apply to the child via OR-merge with the child's own. Default false (child enforces its own rules only). Hookup into SharingRuleEngine is a follow-up — today the flag is preserved on the def but not yet consulted at query time.

triggers.description: When true, parent's column-level transforms (`beforeWrite` / `afterRead`) propagate onto inherited columns the child did not redefine. Default false (child gets bare column types only).

inverseField.description: Required for `type: 'one-to-many'` — name of the field on the inverse side.

joinTable.description: Required for `type: 'many-to-many'`. Bare string is shorthand for `{ name }`.

transformsBlock.description: Slice B2 — per-column transform pipeline. `beforeWrite` fires on insert/update; `afterRead` fires on load.

transformSpec.description: Either a transform name (string shorthand) or `{ transform, unless?, method?, mode?, from? }`.

method.description: Class method name — only meaningful for `class:*` transforms (slice B6). Defaults to 'transform'.

mode.description: Class execution mode — only meaningful for `class:*`. 'sandbox' is reserved for slice B6.b.

from.description: §9.24 (1b) — cross-package source `<namespace>/<packageName>`. Only meaningful for `class:*` transforms; resolves the class file under that package's classes/transforms/ directory instead of the declaring scope.
